title: Forge Question Evidence
description: Evidence captured from a specific interview question. It maps question to evidence to detected signal without calculating a score.

interviewId.description: Interview where this evidence was captured.

examples: What goals have you not completed yet?

answer.description: Candidate answer or summary. Must be observed, not invented.
examples: Candidate described an unfinished business goal and what needs to change.

evidence.description: Human-readable observed evidence extracted from the answer.
examples: Candidate owned the missed goal and named a corrective action.

assessmentDimension.description: Candidate assessment dimension linked to the signal.

confidence.description: Confidence in the evidence mapping. This is not a candidate score.

capturedAt.description: ISO timestamp when evidence was captured.

examples.question: What goals have you not completed yet?
examples.answer: Candidate described an unfinished business goal and what needs to change.
examples.evidence: Candidate owned the missed goal and named a corrective action.
